TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Connie Mack Berry sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1915, byacing te 4 ru 15 ryax qu hintgan nya (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1980), kinhulan nya ga South Carolina, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 191 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 98 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. 1936-1938 kawas Berry mzyu mari qsahuy maki pakalolaynacoli kruhu' pqwasan biru.Berry na take mari maki NCSU. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨonnie maʦ~ʨk βerrj s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****), kinħulan nja ɣa s~ɕoutħ ʦ~ʨarolina, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. ****-**** kawas~ɕ βerrj mzju mari qs~ɕaħuj maki pakalolajnaʦ~ʨoli kruħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.βerrj na take mari maki nʦ~ʨs~ɕu. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Connie Mack Berry sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1915, byacing te 4 ru 15 ryax qu hintgan nya (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1980), kinhulan nya ga South Carolina, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 191 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 98 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. 1936-1938 kawas Berry mzyu mari qsahuy maki pakalolaynacoli kruhu' pqwasan biru.Berry na take mari maki NCSU. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨonnie maʦ~ʨk βerrj s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****), kinħulan nja ɣa s~ɕoutħ ʦ~ʨarolina, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. ****-**** kawas~ɕ βerrj mzju mari qs~ɕaħuj maki pakalolajnaʦ~ʨoli kruħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.βerrj na take mari maki nʦ~ʨs~ɕu. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
